intro: Pachystele dubia is a species of orchid, commonly known as the "Dubia Orchid," native to tropical regions in Central and South America. The health benefits of Pachystele dubia include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Pachystele dubia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Pachystele dubia is commonly prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies such as teas and poultices to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
